subcodes.first_line: In the Most Holy Book, by the Ancient Pen, four festivals have been ordained for all who dwell on earth, wherein the people of Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در کتاب اقدس از قلم قدم از برای من فی العالم چهار عید مقرر شده که اهل بهاء در آن اعیاد
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @work as worship, @Declaration; advent of the Bab
